search_signals.text: ### Polymarket and Bitcoin Price Prediction Markets Polymarket is a decentralized prediction market platform built on blockchain (primarily using USDC on Polygon), where users can bet on real-world outcomes, including cryptocurrency prices like Bitcoin (BTC). It's popular in the crypto community for gauging market sentiment through crowd-sourced probabilities. For Bitcoin price bets, markets often include options like "Will BTC hit $X by date Y?" or short-term up/down predictions, with odds refl...
